sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110198" key="falio/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φᾰλιόπους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, neut. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n110198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">white-footed,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
